retrieved_result: Opening PTB files Opening PTB files Did your computer fail to open a PTB file? We explain what PTB files are and recommend software that we know can open or convert your PTB files. What is a PTB file? PTB is an acronym for Power Tab File. Files that contain the .ptb file extension most commonly store music tablatures
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about PTB files (Power Tab) and is unrelated to Docker setup for beginners.
